description: Get dressed in these dressy T-straps from catwalk. The heavily embellished panels lend a dose of chic style to your appearance, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Leather straps for comfort and durability Heavily embellished T-strap for added style Leather lining for extra comfort Midsole Leather covered ergonomic resin footbed for added style and comfort Outsole TPU outsole with textured surface for added grip Ergonomic heel with a textured sole for better grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
